frames.description: The scene shows a street view with several commercial shops. On the left, there's a building under construction. The main shops visible are S.S. Surgical, BM Lock Centre, and Shree Ganesh Aluminium. Power lines and a utility pole are in the foreground.
signs: SHREE GANESH ALUMINIUM - 25/580(45), Manjakulam Road, M.J. Complex, Palakkad - 678 014
Dealers in: Aluminium Section, Curtain Items, Bus Body Section, Aluminium Sheet, Coil, A.C.P. Sheet & P.V.C. Sheet, U.P.V.C. Profile Thermocol, Ladder & H/W Etc.
frames.vehicles: Two scooters are parked in front of the shops.
frames.infrastructure: Commercial buildings, utility poles, and power lines.

frames.description: The camera moves closer to the 'Shree Ganesh Aluminium' shop. Numerous aluminum ladders of various sizes are displayed outside the store on the sidewalk.
frames.vehicles: A scooter is parked to the left of the ladders.

frames.description: The camera passes 'Shree Ganesh Aluminium' and approaches 'RUBI REXINE'. An auto-rickshaw is partially visible in the bottom foreground.
frames.vehicles: A black and green auto-rickshaw.
frames.scene_changes: Continuing movement past the first set of shops.

frames.description: The camera is now in front of 'RUBI REXINE', a shop specializing in furnishing materials. A white van is parked on the street in front of the shop.
frames.vehicles: A white van with a yellow bird decal on its rear window.

frames.description: The scene focuses on the mattress section of 'RUBI REXINE', featuring a large 'Kurl-on' sign. Two workers are seen handling bright pink foam pieces near a parked motorcycle.
frames.vehicles: A blue and black motorcycle.
frames.pedestrians: Two men working outside the shop.
frames.infrastructure: Shop front with mattresses and foam displayed.

frames.description: The camera passes a red truck loaded with pink foam. The next shop is 'RUBI CARPETS'. A blue 'Kurl-on' sign and other brand banners are visible.
frames.vehicles: A red pickup truck.

frames.description: The camera moves past 'RUBI CARPETS' and approaches 'Imperial HALWA'. Mattresses are stacked outside. A black scooter is parked nearby.
frames.vehicles: A black scooter.
frames.pedestrians: A person is partially visible inside the shop area.

frames.description: The camera passes 'Imperial HALWA' and shows a building named 'CA ARCADE'. It appears to have vacant units for rent. A checkerboard-patterned floor is in front of the building.
signs: Finpal - ACCOUNTING TAX TRADEMARK PARTNERSHIP & COMPANY REGN CONSULTANCY
frames.vehicles: None visible.
frames.pedestrians: A man in a white shirt is standing near the halwa shop.
frames.infrastructure: A white two-story building with blue shutters.

frames.description: The camera moves past the alleyway next to 'CA ARCADE' towards a building with a 'Berger' paint sign. Several motorcycles are parked in the distance.
frames.vehicles: Multiple motorcycles parked in the distance.

frames.description: The scene shows the corner of a building with signs for 'KARATT KURIES' and 'Berger Paint'. Some painting advertisements are on the ground.
frames.vehicles: None visible.
frames.scene_changes: Approaching a curve in the road.

frames.description: The camera rounds the corner, revealing 'C.K.P TRADERS AGROMART'. This store sells agricultural and power equipment.
frames.vehicles: None visible.
frames.scene_changes: Entering a new segment of the street.

frames.description: The camera is directly in front of 'C.K.P TRADERS AGROMART'. Agricultural equipment like wheelbarrows and tillers are displayed outside.
frames.vehicles: None visible.

frames.description: Moving past the agromart towards a large tyre shop. A yellow and blue Goodyear sign is visible.
frames.vehicles: A motorcycle is parked in front of the agromart.

frames.description: The camera is in front of the 'GOODYEAR AUTOCARE' shop, also branded as 'PEOPLES TYRES'. Many tyres are stacked outside.
signs: GOODYEAR AUTOCARE - TYRES WHEEL ALIGNMENT & BALANCING TYRE CHANGING NITROGEN AIR
frames.vehicles: A black car is partially visible in the bottom foreground.

frames.description: The camera shows the full storefront of 'PEOPLES TYRES' with Goodyear branding. There are stacks of tyres and some promotional signs for other tyre brands.
frames.vehicles: A stack of tyres is prominently visible.
frames.scene_changes: Moving past the tyre shop entrance.

frames.description: The camera continues past the tyre shop. An alleyway is visible beside it. Several brand logos for tyres and a bank are seen.
frames.vehicles: None visible.
frames.pedestrians: A few people are standing near the shop entrance.
frames.scene_changes: Continuing the drive past the shops.

frames.description: The camera moves towards a building with 'IDFC FIRST Bharat' signage and lists several tyre brands.
frames.vehicles: Multiple motorcycles are parked in the alleyway.
frames.pedestrians: A man is standing near the motorcycles.

frames.description: A man on a phone is standing next to a group of parked motorcycles. A large building with gray corrugated metal siding is ahead.
frames.vehicles: A row of parked motorcycles.
frames.pedestrians: One man using a mobile phone.

frames.description: The camera shows the gray corrugated metal building with several closed shutters. A small brown car is parked in front of it.
frames.vehicles: A brown Maruti Suzuki Alto/Celerio and several motorcycles are parked.
frames.pedestrians: A man is sitting on a motorcycle.

frames.description: A closer view of the parked brown car and the gray corrugated metal building. A utility pole is in the foreground.
frames.vehicles: Brown car.
frames.infrastructure: Utility pole, building with metal siding.

frames.description: The camera moves past the gray building towards a more open area with some greenery and a white wall. Another building with a green roof is in the background.
frames.vehicles: Part of a brown car on the left.
frames.pedestrians: Head of a person partially visible in the bottom foreground.
frames.scene_changes: Transitioning to a less dense area.

frames.description: The camera turns right, revealing a large orange and yellow truck with 'Kerala Roadways' written on it. A building with a green roof is visible in the distance.
frames.vehicles: A large orange and yellow logistics truck.

frames.description: Close-up shot of the red corrugated metal side of the truck.
frames.vehicles: Side view of a red/orange truck.

frames.description: The camera moves past the truck and returns to a street with more shops. 'AL ALUMIN DESIGN' is on the right. A man is walking on the dirt road.
frames.vehicles: None visible.
frames.pedestrians: A man in a brown shirt is walking away from the camera.
frames.scene_changes: Entering a new section of shops.

frames.description: The camera approaches 'AL ALUMIN DESIGN', which has a bright red shop front. A sign for 'duroflex' is also visible.
signs: AL ALUMIN DESIGN - ALL KINDS OF INTERIOR & EXTERIOR WORK
frames.vehicles: None visible.

frames.description: The camera is in front of 'AL ALUMIN DESIGN' and 'duroflex mattresses'. 'JPS ASSOCIATE' branding is also present on the duroflex sign.
frames.vehicles: None visible.
frames.scene_changes: Moving past mattress and design shops.

frames.description: The scene shows 'JPS ASSOCIATE' branding alongside 'REPOSE' mattresses. A notice on the shutter in Malayalam informs about a shop name change.
signs: REPOSE WAKE UP TO FRESH IDEAS
JPS ASSOCIATE ഷോപ്പ് RL FURNISHING എന്ന പേരിൽ മാറിയിരിക്കുന്നു Near OMR BIRIYANI Mob: 9074871831 (Malayalam: JPS Associate shop has changed its name to RL Furnishing...)
frames.vehicles: A motorcycle is parked on the right.

frames.description: Passing the mattress shop, the next building is pink and gray. An auto-rickshaw is partially visible. The signage indicates it sells furnishing materials.
frames.vehicles: A black scooter and part of a yellow auto-rickshaw.

frames.description: The camera moves in front of the pink building towards 'WIRE & WIRENET'. A yellow auto-rickshaw is in the foreground. Rolls of colored plastic mesh are stacked outside.
frames.vehicles: Yellow auto-rickshaw.

frames.description: The camera is in front of 'WIRE & WIRENET'. Large rolls of wire and plastic mesh are displayed. An elderly man is standing in front of the shop near a parked motorcycle.
signs: Products: G.I & M.S WELDED MESH, G.I & P.V.C CHAIN LINK, G.I WIREMESH, P.V.C COATED WELDED MESH, P.V.C & SS MOSQUITO MESH, GI WIRE, MS WIRE, BARBED WIRE, CHICKEN MESH, ASHPHALTIC ROOFING SHEET, AGRO SHADE NET
frames.vehicles: A black motorcycle with red accents.
frames.pedestrians: A man with a red scarf over his shoulder is standing by the shop.
frames.scene_changes: Final frame showing a hardware store.
